top_signals.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows

top_signals.title: Anglo American, Codelco to add 2.7Mt copper with no new mine
top_signals.summary: The companies will merge two of Chile's largest copper operations, increasing production by millions of tonnes over 20 years.

top_signals.title: Canada eyes special status for Far North resource roads
top_signals.summary: The federal government is considering granting national interest status to the C$2-billion Mackenzie Valley Highway and Grays Bay Road and Port initiative.
